questions.question: Gradual
questions.solution:
• Meaning: Gradual = धीरे-धीरे
  • Opposite Idea: Abrupt = अचानक
  • Example: The change was abrupt, not gradual.
  • Exam Tip: Sudden actions oppose gradual change.

questions.question: Seize
questions.solution:
• Meaning: Seize = कसकर पकड़ना
  • Opposite Idea: Loosen = ढीला करना
  • Example: Do not loosen your grip.
  • Exam Tip: Tight ↔ Loose pairs.

questions.question: Putrefy
questions.solution:
• Meaning: Putrefy = सड़ना
  • Opposite Idea: Combine = जोड़ना
  • Example: Fresh items combine, rotten ones putrefy.
  • Exam Tip: Formation ↔ Decay.

questions.question: Hope
questions.solution:
• Meaning: Hope = आशा
  • Opposite Idea: Doubt = संदेह
  • Example: Hope replaces doubt.
  • Exam Tip: Belief ↔ Uncertainty.

questions.question: Widespread
questions.solution:
• Meaning: Widespread = व्यापक
  • Opposite Idea: Limited = सीमित
  • Example: The impact was limited.
  • Exam Tip: Wide ↔ Narrow.

questions.question: Pompous
questions.solution:
• Meaning: Pompous = घमंडी
  • Opposite Idea: Humble = विनम्र
  • Example: A humble person avoids pomp.
  • Exam Tip: Pride ↔ Modesty.

questions.question: Toxic
questions.solution:
• Meaning: Toxic = विषैला
  • Opposite Idea: Healthy = स्वस्थ
  • Example: Healthy food is non-toxic.
  • Exam Tip: Harmful ↔ Beneficial.

questions.question: Invade
questions.solution:
• Meaning: Invade = आक्रमण करना
  • Opposite Idea: Surrender = आत्मसमर्पण
  • Example: One side surrendered.
  • Exam Tip: Attack ↔ Yield.

questions.question: Harmony
questions.solution:
• Meaning: Harmony = सामंजस्य
  • Opposite Idea: Conflict = संघर्ष
  • Example: Harmony avoids conflict.
  • Exam Tip: Peace ↔ Clash.

questions.question: Elated
questions.solution:
• Meaning: Elated = बहुत खुश
  • Opposite Idea: Depressed = उदास
  • Example: He felt depressed.
  • Exam Tip: Happy ↔ Sad.

questions.question: Hazard
questions.solution:
• Meaning: Hazard = खतरा
  • Opposite Idea: Safety = सुरक्षा
  • Example: Safety reduces hazard.
  • Exam Tip: Danger ↔ Protection.

questions.question: Magnificent
questions.solution:
• Meaning: Magnificent = भव्य
  • Opposite Idea: Modest = साधारण
  • Example: A modest home.
  • Exam Tip: Grand ↔ Simple.

questions.question: Stalwart
questions.solution:
• Meaning: Stalwart = साहसी
  • Opposite Idea: Cowardly = डरपोक
  • Example: A coward lacks courage.
  • Exam Tip: Brave ↔ Timid.

questions.question: Augment
questions.solution:
• Meaning: Augment = बढ़ाना
  • Opposite Idea: Diminish = घटाना
  • Example: Costs diminished.
  • Exam Tip: Increase ↔ Decrease.

questions.question: Lessen
questions.solution:
• Meaning: Lessen = घटाना
  • Opposite Idea: Increase = बढ़ाना
  • Example: Profits increased.
  • Exam Tip: Reduce ↔ Grow.
